name: Modern Textured Ceramic Bud Vase White - Threshold™
description:
Add a touch of sophistication to your space with this White Textured Ceramic Bud Vase from Threshold™. Made of ceramic, this white vase features a spiral-textured pattern for striking, earthy charm. Designed in a round shape, this watertight vase can also be used to display fresh stems anywhere in your home.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
